cases.title: Testing-plan §3 Manual correction governance row covers AcademicAdmin override after lecturer window expiry
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Manual correction governance block applies (FR-20, FR-21, BR-14/15/16, AC-13, AC-14).
Closed session exists with enrolled student AttendanceRecord status Absent from close-time finalization.
Effective policy manualEditWindow has elapsed since session closedAt.
AcademicAdmin bearer token has institution scope covering the class section.
steps: Confirm assigned Lecturer PATCH correction returns EditWindowExpired per BR-15.
Authenticate as AcademicAdmin with institution scope covering the session class section.
Submit PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present, documented reason, and Idempotency-Key.
Query AttendanceRecord and AuditLog for the student-session pair.
Verify checkInMethod is Admin Correction and audit captures old and new values.
cases.expected: Scenario-matrix maps to testing-plan Manual correction governance: AcademicAdmin override succeeds after lecturer window expiry per FR-21 and BR-16; AttendanceRecord updates with checkInMethod Admin Correction; full audit entry records actor, oldStatus Absent, newStatus Manual Present, and reason.

cases.title: M05 Attendance Ledger correctAttendance persists admin override and audit row in DB transaction
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for M05 Attendance Ledger and M08 Audit and Compliance modules.
Closed session exists with enrolled student AttendanceRecord status Absent.
manualEditWindow from effective policy has elapsed; lecturer correction is blocked.
AcademicAdmin actor has institution scope covering the class section.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Absent, checkInMethod system-assigned or null.
Invoke M05 correctAttendance through application service as AcademicAdmin with status Excused, reason, and Idempotency-Key.
Query attendance_records and audit_logs tables for target studentUserId and classSessionId.
Verify M06 policy resolution permits admin override bypassing lecturer edit window per PRM-07.
Assert correlation ID links mutation to audit entry.
cases.expected: M05 module boundary commits AttendanceRecord with afterState Excused and checkInMethod Admin Correction; exactly one audit_logs row records actorUserId AcademicAdmin, oldStatus Absent, newStatus Excused, reason, and occurredAt per FR-29 and BR-22.

cases.title: SM-03 AttendanceRecord transitions Absent to Manual Present via admin override when lecturer window expired
preconditions: Closed class session exists in integration test database with SM-01 state Closed.
Enrolled student has AttendanceRecord in Absent state from close-time finalization (BR-13).
manualEditWindow has elapsed; lecturer correction attempt is rejected with EditWindowExpired.
AcademicAdmin is in authorized scope for the class section.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Absent; session state Closed.
Execute lecturer manual correction command and confirm rejection without state change.
Execute AcademicAdmin override correction with status Manual Present and required reason.
Capture afterState for AttendanceRecord and verify checkInMethod Admin Correction.
Verify AttendanceCorrected event is emitted with old and new status.
cases.expected: beforeState Absent is unchanged after expired-window lecturer attempt per BR-15; admin override transitions afterState to Manual Present with checkInMethod Admin Correction per BR-16; session remains Closed with no illegal SM-01 transitions.

cases.title: Idempotent admin PATCH attendance correction returns prior applied mutation without duplicate audit rows
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; manualEditWindow has elapsed.
AcademicAdmin bearer token has institution scope.
Idempotency-Key header support is enabled for PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId}.
Real database with audit_logs immutability constraints.
steps: Issue admin PATCH correction with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key K1; record response.
Replay identical PATCH with same Idempotency-Key K1, same body, and same AcademicAdmin actor.
Query AttendanceRecord and audit_logs count for the student-session pair.
Compare second response to first accepted mutation summary.
cases.expected: First admin request applies correction with checkInMethod Admin Correction and writes one audit row; replay returns already-applied mutation summary without second AttendanceRecord change or duplicate audit_logs entry per API idempotency rules.

cases.title: PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} returns 200 for AcademicAdmin override after edit window
preconditions: AcademicAdmin is authenticated with bearer token and institution scope.
Closed session exists with student AttendanceRecord status Absent.
manualEditWindow from effective policy has elapsed since session closedAt.
Policy requires reason for admin corrections.
steps: AcademicAdmin calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with body {"status": "Manual Present", "reason": "Giai quyet khieu nai sau khi het han chinh sua cua giang vien."} and Idempotency-Key header.
Inspect HTTP status 200, response envelope data fields, and error is null.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance and locate the corrected student row.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs filtered by targetId and actionType for admin attendance update.
cases.expected: PATCH returns HTTP 200 with standard envelope; roster row shows attendanceStatus Manual Present and checkInMethod Admin Correction; audit query returns entry with oldStatus Absent, newStatus Manual Present, AcademicAdmin actor, reason, and timestamp.

cases.title: POST /v1/enrollments/import seeds roster then AcademicAdmin PATCH corrects imported student attendance
preconditions: AcademicAdmin has created class section with closed session.
POST /v1/enrollments/import accepts enrolled student row for the section.
Session close assigned Absent to imported student without check-in.
manualEditWindow has elapsed; lecturer correction is blocked.
steps: AcademicAdmin calls POST /v1/enrollments/import with classSectionId and valid studentCode rows; assert HTTP 200 with acceptedRows count and rejectedRows array for invalid rows without silent skips.
Verify imported student appears in GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance with Absent status.
AcademicAdmin calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and dispute-resolution reason.
Re-fetch GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance for the imported student row.
cases.expected: Enrollment import establishes eligible roster per FR-04 with row-level rejection visibility; admin attendance correction on imported enrolled student succeeds with HTTP 200 PATCH and roster reflects Manual Present with checkInMethod Admin Correction per FR-21 and BR-16.

cases.title: POST /v1/auth/login and GET /v1/me establish AcademicAdmin context before PATCH attendance override
preconditions: AcademicAdmin account exists with institution-issued credentials and institution scope claims.
Closed session with Absent student exists; manualEditWindow has elapsed.
steps: Call POST /v1/auth/login with AcademicAdmin email and password; assert HTTP 200 with accessToken and roles including AcademicAdmin.
Call GET /v1/me with Authorization bearer token; assert HTTP 200 with actor identity and institution scope claims.
Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with Manual Present status, reason, and Idempotency-Key using the same bearer token.
Inspect PATCH HTTP 200 response envelope and error is null.
cases.expected: Authenticated AcademicAdmin session per FR-15 and FR-36 gates admin attendance override; GET /v1/me confirms AcademicAdmin role and scope before FR-21 correction succeeds with HTTP 200 and checkInMethod Admin Correction.

cases.title: GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance live roster reflects admin correction payload shape
preconditions: Closed session exists with enrolled student showing Absent on roster.
AcademicAdmin is authenticated with institution scope; manualEditWindow has elapsed.
Baseline GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance captured before admin correction.
steps: AcademicAdmin calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Late and documented dispute reason.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance immediately after PATCH.
Assert HTTP 200 envelope with data.classSessionId, data.state, data.counts, and data.rows array.
Locate corrected student row and assert attendanceStatus Late, checkInMethod Admin Correction, and counts reflect status change from baseline.
cases.expected: Live roster GET per FR-19 contract returns HTTP 200 with updated row showing attendanceStatus Late, checkInMethod Admin Correction, and adjusted counts after FR-21 admin override.

cases.title: WF-08 primary workflow AcademicAdmin dispute resolution applies attendance override with audit
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists after lecturer edit window expired.
CheckInAttempt history shows failed QR or GPS rejection for the student.
AcademicAdmin bearer token is available with institution scope.
Audit query endpoint is available.
steps: AcademicAdmin reviews GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance and GET /v1/audit-logs for dispute evidence bundle.
AcademicAdmin submits PATCH correction to Manual Present with documented dispute-resolution reason.
AcademicAdmin refreshes roster via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs for the admin correction event with old and new status fields.
cases.expected: End-to-end WF-08 dispute path completes per FR-21: student status changes from Absent to Manual Present via admin override; roster reflects update with checkInMethod Admin Correction; audit record is queryable with full actor/time/old/new/reason fields.

cases.title: Alternate branch DepartmentAdmin scoped correction succeeds within assigned faculty after lecturer window expired
preconditions: Closed session in assigned faculty with Absent student exists; manualEditWindow has elapsed.
DepartmentAdmin bearer token has faculty scope covering the class section per PRM-02.
Lecturer PATCH attempt returns EditWindowExpired as control.
Institution policy permits DepartmentAdmin correction per BR-16.
steps: Confirm lecturer PATCH correction is rejected with EditWindowExpired.
DepartmentAdmin calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Excused, documented reason, and Idempotency-Key.
Inspect HTTP 200 response envelope and roster via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs for DepartmentAdmin correction event.
cases.expected: DepartmentAdmin alternate path succeeds within faculty scope after lecturer window expiry: AttendanceRecord updates to Excused with checkInMethod Admin Correction; audit entry records DepartmentAdmin actor, reason, old/new status, and timestamp per BR-16.

cases.title: Flow C audit verification after AcademicAdmin attendance override mutation
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; manualEditWindow elapsed.
AcademicAdmin performs override correction changing status to Excused with documented reason.
Audit query endpoint is available to SystemAuditor read scope.
steps: Record roster status before admin correction via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
AcademicAdmin applies PATCH correction with status Excused and reason documenting post-window dispute resolution.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with filters targetType AttendanceRecord, targetId, and time range covering correction.
Verify audit payload fields against CMP-01 minimum audit fields from roles-permissions doc.
cases.expected: Committed FR-21 admin mutation has corresponding audit record with actor, role AcademicAdmin, target student/session, old status Absent, new status Excused, reason, and timestamp; no mutation audit gap per BR-22 and AC-19.

cases.title: AcademicAdmin PATCH correction without required reason returns ReasonRequired and preserves prior status
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; manualEditWindow has elapsed.
Effective policy mandates reason for all admin corrections.
AcademicAdmin bearer token is authenticated with institution scope.
steps: Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and empty or omitted reason field.
Inspect HTTP status and error.code in response envelope.
Query AttendanceRecord and audit_logs for the student-session pair.
Retry with valid reason as control to confirm admin override path still available.
cases.expected: Request is rejected with validation error ReasonRequired (400 class); AttendanceRecord remains Absent; no audit_logs mutation entry is written; control request with reason succeeds with checkInMethod Admin Correction.

cases.title: AcademicAdmin PATCH for section outside institution scope returns 403 OutOfScope
preconditions: Closed session in class section outside AcademicAdmin configured institution scope exists.
Student AttendanceRecord status is Absent.
AcademicAdmin bearer token is authenticated but lacks scope for target section.
steps: Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and valid reason.
Inspect HTTP status 403 and error.code OutOfScope in response envelope.
Query AttendanceRecord via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance if readable, or direct DB assertion.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs for manual correction from this admin attempt.
cases.expected: Request is rejected with HTTP 403 OutOfScope per BR-16 exception and BR-19; AttendanceRecord remains Absent; no audit_logs mutation entry is written for the out-of-scope admin attempt.

cases.title: Student, Lecturer after window, SystemAuditor, and ITAdmin denied admin-level attendance override
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; manualEditWindow has elapsed.
Student, SystemAuditor, ITAdmin bearer tokens and Lecturer token for assigned section are available.
AcademicAdmin token with institution scope is available as authorized control.
steps: Student calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and reason.
Assigned Lecturer calls the same PATCH after edit window expiry.
SystemAuditor calls the same PATCH for the session.
ITAdmin calls the same PATCH without explicit academic grant.
AcademicAdmin calls the same PATCH as control with valid reason.
Verify AttendanceRecord state after denied attempts.
cases.expected: Student, expired-window Lecturer, SystemAuditor, and ITAdmin receive HTTP 403 Forbidden or EditWindowExpired as applicable per permission matrix; no attendance mutation or audit write occurs from denied roles; AcademicAdmin control succeeds and updates status with checkInMethod Admin Correction per FR-21.

cases.title: AcademicAdmin ManualCorrectionDialog on PG-13 reports submits override with reason and updates status badge
preconditions: AcademicAdmin is authenticated on desktop browser at PG-13 attendance reports.
Closed session student row displays Absent danger badge; lecturer edit window has expired.
ManualCorrectionDialog supports admin override path with required reason field.
steps: Navigate to /reports/attendance, filter to target class section and session, and locate Absent student row.
Open ManualCorrectionDialog from row action; select Manual Present in status dropdown.
Enter dispute-resolution reason in labeled Lý do textarea and confirm via dialog submit.
Observe AttendanceStatusCell updates to Manual Present success variant with Admin Correction method indicator.
Verify dialog closes and report row reflects corrected status without full page reload.
cases.expected: Browser admin correction journey completes per FR-21: form gating enforces required reason before submit; post-save report row shows Manual Present badge with admin correction method; UI state matches API override and audit write with old and new values.
